title: cyperus pallens
intro: Cyperus pallens, also known as the slender umbrella sedge, is a species of sedge native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cyperus pallens include its ability to treat fever, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and a treatment for digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Cyperus pallens include infusions, tinctures, and poultices, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments and promote overall well-being.
